metadata.title: Banners
metadata.description: Add banner images to your notes!

regex.source: text:"Banners created in 1.x use an outdated syntax for internal files that no longer work in 2.0. To update this throughout your vault, go to the bottom of the Banners settings tab"
regex.target: text:"在 1.x 中创建的横幅使用过时的内部文件语法，在 2.0 中已不再适用。要在整个库中更新，请转到 横幅设置 选项卡底部"

.innerHTML=`Adjust the banner width to only be as wide as the readable line length, which is used by Obsidian's Readable line length setting. It is recommended to toggle this together with that setting.`
regex.target: .innerHTML=`将横幅宽度调整为仅与可读行长一样宽，该长度由 Obsidian 的 可读的行长（Readable line length） 设置使用。建议将此设置与该设置一起切换。`

regex.source:
.innerHTML=`Set a modifier key that must be used to drag a banner.
For example, setting it to \u21E7 Shift means you must hold down Shift in order to move a banner by dragging it. This can help avoid accidental banner movements.`
regex.target:
.innerHTML=`设置必须用于拖动横幅的修改键。
例如，将其设置为 \u21E7 Shift 意味着您必须按住 Shift 才能通过拖动横幅来移动横幅。这有助于避免横幅意外移动。`

regex.source:
.innerHTML=`Display the banner in the internal file embed. This is the embed that appears when you write ![[file]] in a file.
Note: You might need to reload Obsidian after toggling this setting`
regex.target:
.innerHTML=`在内部文件嵌入中显示横幅。这是在文件中写入 ![[file]] 时出现的嵌入。
注意： 切换此设置后，您可能需要重新加载 Obsidian。`

regex.source: .innerHTML=`Display the banner in the page preview popover. This is the preview that appears from the Page Preview core plugin.`
regex.target: .innerHTML=`在页面预览弹出窗口中显示横幅。这是从页面预览核心插件中出现的预览。`

regex.source: .innerHTML=`Enable and display the lock button on the corner of a banner. When combined with the Banner drag modifier key setting, it might be desirable to disable this.`
regex.target: .innerHTML=`在横幅的角落启用并显示锁定按钮。当与 横幅拖动修改键 设置结合使用时，可能需要禁用此功能。`

regex.source: .innerHTML=`Use Twemoji instead of your device's native emoji set. Makes emojis consistent across devices`
regex.target: .innerHTML=`使用Twemoji而不是您设备的本地表情符号集。这使得不同设备之间的表情符号保持一致。`

regex.source:
.innerHTML=`Limit how many suggestions to display in this modal.
Note: setting a high number while Show preview images setting is toggled on may cause slowdowns`
regex.target:
.innerHTML=`限制在此模式中显示的建议数量。
注意：在打开“显示预览图像”设置时设置较高的数字可能会导致速度变慢`

regex.source:
.innerHTML=`If enabled, the Paste banner from clipboard command will automatically download the image from the URL into your vault and link it as an internal file. Great if you want to keep some banners you found online!
If you want to download them on a case-by-case basis though, you can use the Download banner in note to vault command for a note with a remote banner URL.`
regex.target:
.innerHTML=`如果启用，从剪贴板粘贴横幅 命令会自动将图像从 URL 下载到 Vault 中，并将其链接为内部文件。如果您想保留一些在网上找到的横幅，那就太好了！
但是，如果您想根据具体情况下载它们，您可以对具有远程横幅 URL 的注释使用 将笔记中的横幅下载到库中 命令。`

regex.source:
.textContent=`Allow banner dragging from within the preview popover.
      This may act a bit finicky though.`
regex.target: .textContent=`允许在预览弹出窗口中拖动横幅。不过这可能会有点麻烦。`

regex.source:
.textContent=`Align the header vertically relative to a banner, if any. If there's no banner, this setting
    has no effect.`
regex.target: .textContent=`相对于横幅（如果有）垂直对齐标题。如果没有横幅，此设置无效。`

regex.source:
.textContent=`Select a folder to exclusively search for banner files in. If empty, it will search
    the entire vault for image files`
regex.target: .textContent=`选择专门搜索横幅文件的文件夹。如果为空，它将搜索整个库的图像文件`

regex.source:
.textContent=`If you used Banners 1.x in the past, you may need to update the syntax for your banners'
    sources across your notes. This will help you do that automatically in one go.`
regex.target: .textContent=`如果您过去使用的是 Banners 1.x，您可能需要更新整个笔记中横幅源的语法。这将帮助您一次性自动完成更新。`

regex.source:
.textContent=`This plugin uses a cache to quickly return banner images, which is especially useful with
    remote images. While this cache resets whenever you reopen/reload Obsidian, you can flush
    the cache here if you're running into an issue with it.`
regex.target: .textContent=`该插件使用缓存快速返回横幅图片，这对远程图片尤其有用。只要重新打开/加载 Obsidian，缓存就会重置，如果遇到问题，可以在这里刷新缓存。`

regex.source: .textContent="Set a style for all of your banners"
.textContent="Allow banner dragging from within an internal embed"
regex.target: .textContent="允许从内部嵌入中拖动横幅"
.textContent="在预览弹出窗口中启用拖动"

regex.source: .textContent="Add a shadow or border on the header elements to help with readability."
regex.target: .textContent="在标题元素上添加阴影或边框以帮助提高可读性。"

regex.source: .textContent="Display a preview image of the suggested banner images"
regex.target: .textContent="显示建议横幅图像的预览图像"

regex.source:
.innerHTML=`

As of Obsidian 1.4, the new Properties view supports the internal file syntax, which makes it more straightforward to use local images as banners.

Because of this, Banners 2.0 will no longer use the previous syntax for local images ("![[filename]]"). If you used Banners 1.x in the past, this modal can facillitate this change by scanning all of your notes in your vault for the legacy source syntax and update it appropriately (at least to the best of its ability).

Warning: this process will check the frontmatter of all your files and make changes to files with the legacy syntax. This should be safe, but may take a bit and backing up your files beforehand is always good.

`
regex.target:
.innerHTML=`

从 Obsidian 1.4 开始，新的属性视图支持内部文件语法，这使得使用本地图像作为横幅变得更加简单。

因此，Banners 2.0 将不再使用以前的本地图像语法（"![[filename]]"）。如果您过去使用过 Banners 1.x，此模式可以通过扫描您库中所有笔记的遗留源语法来便于此更改，并相应地更新它（至少尽其所能）。

警告：此过程将检查所有文件的前置数据，并对具有遗留语法的文件进行更改。这应该是安全的，但可能需要一些时间，提前备份文件总是好的。

`

regex.source: "All files are already good to go!"
